description_long: This is a small, single-story wooden cabin with a rectangular footprint and a simple gable roof. The exterior walls are clad in horizontal wooden planks, giving it a rustic and utilitarian appearance. The roof is corrugated, likely metal or wood, and extends slightly beyond the walls, providing minimal overhang. There are several small, rectangular windows symmetrically distributed along the longer sides, and a single door is visible on one of the shorter sides, adjacent to a small set of steps. The cabin sits low to the ground and lacks any visible foundation or skirting. The overall design is functional and modest, suitable for rural or suburban settings.
description: A small, rustic wooden cabin with a gable roof, multiple small windows, and a single side entrance with steps.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main facade with two small windows and the gable roof above.
description_view_1: Angled view reveals the side entrance with steps and a small window next to the door.
description_view_2: Rear view displays three small windows evenly spaced along the back wall.
description_view_3: Opposite angled view highlights the plain side wall with no visible windows or doors.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with slight overhang, corrugated material
attribute_window_arrangement: Multiple small rectangular windows symmetrically distributed along the longer sides and rear, with two on the front and three on the back
attribute_door_placement: Single exterior door on the right side of the front facade, accessed by a small set of steps
